reviews.review_description: This is an ideal tour for those who'd like to see many historical sites coupled with interesting facts but lack the ability to get there. It's much cheaper than traveling there in person as well. There are so many locations to see, and I enjoy that the map is shown indicating the distance between each location.

reviews.review_title: My favorite tour by these guys
reviews.review_description: Of all the Immersive bible tours these guys release, this is my favorite because I see the places where biblical things happened and get to hear parts of the story for association. I really loved it.
